items.title: Drake Becomes First Artist to Hold Top Three Billboard 200 Spots
items.summary: Iceman, Habibti, and Maid of Honour just made history

items.title: “It Takes Two” Rapper Rob Base Dies at 59
items.summary: The Harlem MC, who was one-half of the duo Rob Base & DJ E-Z Rock, had been living with cancer

items.title: Listen to Mike D’s New Song “What We Got”
items.summary: It’s the Beastie Boy’s second solo single, following “Switch Up”
